cards.name: Arcade
abilities: Start of Game: Arcade captures 5 [keyword:Human Shields].
Always Leads: Murderworld
Master Strike: Arcade captures a random Bystander from each player's Victory Pile as a [keyword:Human Shield]. Each player who didn't have a Bystander gains a Wound instead.

cards.name: Epic Arcade
abilities: Start of Game: Arcade captures 8 [keyword:Human Shields]. Play a random Horror.
Always Leads: Murderworld
Master Strike: Arcade captures two random Bystander from each player's Victory Pile as a [keyword:Human Shield]. Each player who didn't have two Bystanders gains a Wound instead.

cards.name: I Love a Parade!
abilities: Fight: Arcade captures two [keyword:Human Shields]. Play an extra card from the Villain Deck next turn.

cards.name: I Need an Audience
abilities: Fight: Arcade captures [keyword:Human Shields] equal to the number of Villains in the city.

cards.name: Roulette Wheel of Death
abilities: Fight: Arcade captures a random Bystander as a [keyword:Human Shield] from each of these places: The Bystander Stack, the Escape Pile, each city space, and each other player's Victory Pile.

cards.name: Welcome to my Theme Park!
abilities: Fight: Arcade and each Murderworld Villain in the city capture two [keyword:Human Shields].

cards.name: Dark Phoenix
abilities: Always Leads: Hellfire Club
Master Strike: KO the top card of the Hero Deck and each card in the Hero Deck that shares a color with it. Shuffle the Hero Deck.
Dark Phoenix Wins: When the Hero Deck is empty.

cards.name: Epic Dark Phoenix
abilities: Always Leads: Hellfire Club

Master Strike: KO the top card of the Hero Deck and each card in the Hero Deck that shares a color with it. Shuffle the Hero Deck. Then, each player plays a Hellfire Club card from their Victory Pile. Next, play a random Horror.
Dark Phoenix Wins: When the Hero Deck is empty.

cards.name: Burn the World to Ashes
abilities: Fight: Each other player discards each card from their hand that has the same name as any card in the KO pile.

cards.name: Consume an Entire Galaxy
abilities: Fight: Each other player chooses a card from their discard pile that costs 1 or more and KOs it.

cards.name: Fiery Reincarnation
abilities: Fight: Gain a Hero from the KO pile that costs 7 or more.

cards.name: Worship Me as a God
abilities: Fight: Each other player gains two 0-cost cards from the KO pile.

cards.name: Deathbird
abilities: Deathbird gets +1[icon:attack] for each Shi'ar Villain in the city and Escape Pile.
Always Leads: Shi'ar Imperial Guard and a Shi'ar Henchmen Group.

Master Strike: If there are already any Shi'ar Villains in the city, each player gains a Wound. Then this strike enters the city as a “Shi'ar Battleship“ [icon:7] Villain with 7[icon:attack] worth 5 [icon:piercing].

cards.name: Epic Deathbird
abilities: Deathbird gets +2[icon:attack] for each Shi'ar Villain in the city and Escape Pile.
Always Leads: Shi'ar Imperial Guard and a Shi'ar Henchmen Group.

Master Strike: If there are already any Shi'ar Villains in the city, play a random Horror. Then this strike enters the city as a “Shi'ar Battleship“ [icon:7] Villain with 9[icon:attack] worth 6 [icon:piercing].

cards.name: Shi'ar Elite Bodyguards
abilities: Fight: Rescue 4 Bystanders. This Tactic enters the city as a Villain whose only ability is “Escape: Shuffle this card back into Deathbird's Mastermind Tactics as another Tactic.“

cards.name: Shi'ar Extermination Legion
abilities: Fight: Rescue 4 Bystanders. This Tactic enters the city as a Villain whose only ability is “Escape: Each player discards two cards.“

cards.name: Shi'ar Hovertake Battalion
abilities: Fight: Rescue 4 Bystanders. This Tactic enters the city as a Villain whose only ability is “Escape: Each player gains a Wound.“

cards.name: Shi'ar Master Spies
abilities: Fight: Rescue 4 Bystanders. This Tactic enters the city as a Villain whose only ability is “Escape: This card becomes a Scheme Twist that takes effect immediately.“

cards.name: Mojo
abilities: Start of Game: Mojo captures 3 [keyword:Human Shields].
All Bystanders in Victory Piles are worth 3 [icon:piercing].
Always Leads: Mojoverse
Master Strike: Mojo captures a [keyword:Human Shield]. Each player reveals a [hc:tech] Hero or discards a card at random.

cards.name: Epic Mojo
abilities: Start of Game: Mojo captures 6 [keyword:Human Shields]. Play a random Horror.
All Bystanders in Victory Piles are worth 4 [icon:piercing].
Always Leads: Mojoverse
Master Strike: Mojo and each Mojoverse Villain capture a [keyword:Human Shield]. Each player reveals a [hc:tech] Hero or discards down to 4 cards.

cards.name: Billions of TV Viewers
abilities: Fight: Each player reveals a [hc:tech] Hero or chooses a random Bystander from their Victory Pile. Mojo captures those Bystanders as [keyword:Human Shields].

cards.name: Brain-Melting TV Marathon
abilities: Fight: Each other player without a Mojo Tactic in their Victory Pile gains a Wound.

cards.name: Cross-Dimensional Marketing
abilities: Fight: You get +1[icon:recruit] for each Bystander in your Victory Pile. Mojo captures a [keyword:Human Shield].

cards.name: Mojo Branding Opportunity
abilities: Fight: Draw a card for each Mojoverse Villain in your Victory Pile. Mojo captures a [keyword:Human Shield].

cards.name: Onslaught
abilities: Each player's hand size is 1 less.
Always Leads: Dark Descendants
Master Strike: KO all Heroes [keyword:Dominated] by Onslaught. Then each player reveals their hand and chooses one of their non-grey Heroes. Onslaught [keyword:Dominates] those Heroes.

cards.name: Epic Onslaught
abilities: Each player's hand size is 1 less.
Always Leads: Dark Descendants

Master Strike: KO all Heroes [keyword:Dominated] by Onslaught. Then each player reveals their hand and chooses two of their non-grey Heroes. Onslaught [keyword:Dominates] those Heroes. Then play a random Horror.

cards.name: Godlike Psionic Entity
abilities: Fight: Onslaught [keyword:Dominates] all five Heroes from the HQ.

cards.name: Sins of X-Men Past
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals the top six cards of their deck and chooses an [team:x-men] Hero revealed this way. Onslaught [keyword:Dominates] those Heroes. Put the rest back in random order.

cards.name: Xavier and Magneto Combined
abilities: Fight: Reveal the top three cards of the Hero Deck. Onslaught [keyword:Dominates] all the [team:x-men] and [team:brotherhood] Heroes you revealed. Put the rest back in random order.

cards.name: Worldwide Mental Control
abilities: Fight: Onslaught [keyword:Dominates] four 0-cost Heroes from the KO pile. The next time a player fights Onslaught, KO those 0-cost Heroes.

cards.name: Shadow King
abilities: Always Leads: Shadow-X
Master Strike: KO all Heroes [keyword:Dominated] by Shadow King. Then each player chooses a non-grey Hero from their discard pile. Shadow King [keyword:Dominates] those Heroes.

cards.name: Epic Shadow King
abilities: Start of Game: Play two random Horrors.
Always Leads: Shadow-X
Master Strike: KO all Heroes [keyword:Dominated] by Shadow King. Then each player chooses a non-grey Hero from their discard pile. Shadow King [keyword:Dominates] those Heroes.

cards.name: Fiend of the Astral Plane
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand and shuffles two cards with [icon:recruit] icons from their hand back into their deck.

cards.name: Poison their Minds
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand and chooses one of their non-grey Heroes. Shadow King [keyword:Dominates] those Heroes.

cards.name: Psychic Seduction
abilities: Fight: Shadow King [keyword:Dominates] each Hero that costs 5 or less from the HQ.

cards.name: Telepathic Betrayal
abilities: Fight: If the “Betrayal of the Shadow“ Trap is in any Victory Pile or the KO pile, put it on top of the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Fatale
abilities: Fight: KO one of your Heroes.
Escape: The Mastermind [keyword:Dominates] the top card of the Hero Deck.

cards.name: Havok, Brainwashed
abilities: Fight: Gain this as a Hero.
Escape: Havok becomes a Hero [keyword:Dominated] by the Mastermind.
[keyword:X-Gene] [hc:ranged]: You get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Nemesis
abilities: Ambush: Each player reveals their hand and chooses one of their non-grey Heroes. Nemesis [keyword:Dominates] those Heroes.

cards.name: Psychic Subjugation
abilities: By End of Turn: Recruit the left-most and right-most Heroes in the HQ.
Or Suffer: Each of those Heroes you didn't recruit enters the city as a Villain with [icon:attack] equal to that Hero's cost. When you fight one, you gain it.

cards.name: Random
abilities: Ambush: Random [keyword:Dominates] the top card of the Hero Deck. Then, each player reveals their hand and chooses one of their Heroes with that same cost. Random [keyword:Dominates] those Heroes.

cards.name: Corrupt the Phoenix Force
abilities: By End of Turn: Have no Hellfire Villains in the city.
Or Suffer: This Trap becomes a 6[icon:attack] “Phoenix Force“ [icon:7] Villain that enters the city and [keyword:Dominates] all the Heroes in the HQ that cost 6 or less.

cards.name: Emma Frost (White Queen)
abilities: Ambush: Each player chooses an [team:x-men] Hero from their discard pile. Emma Frost [keyword:Dominates] those Heroes.

cards.name: Harry Leland (Black Bishop)
abilities: Ambush: Heroes cost 1 more to recruit this turn.
Escape: Same effect.

cards.name: Mastermind (Jason Wyngarde)
abilities: Ambush: This Villain ascends to become a [rule:new Mastermind]. He gains the ability “Master Strike: Each player simultaneously reveals a non-grey Hero.“ Mastermind [keyword:Dominates] the revealed Hero with the highest cost (and tied for highest).

cards.name: Sebastian Shaw (Black King)
abilities: Sebastian Shaw has +1[icon:attack] for each card you've played from your hand this turn.
Escape: Each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Mindwarping TV Broadcast
abilities: Ambush: A Villain captures a Bystander.
By End of Turn: Have no Bystanders in the city captured by Villains.
Or Suffer: After you draw your new hand at end of turn, each player discards down to four cards in hand.

cards.name: Minor Domo
abilities: Ambush: Minor Domo captures 2 [keyword:Human Shields].
Escape: Each player simultaneously reveals a card from their hand. Whoever revealed the lowest cost card (or tied for lowest) gains a Wound.

cards.name: Major Domo
abilities: Ambush: Major Domo captures a [keyword:Human Shield].
Escape: Each player simultaneously reveals a card from their hand. Whoever reveals the highest-costing card (or tied for highest) gains a Wound.

cards.name: Spiral
abilities: Ambush: Each player reveals a [hc:covert] Hero or discards their hand. Each player who discarded their hand this way draws 5 cards.
Escape: Same effect.

cards.name: Warwolves
abilities: Ambush: These Warwolves capture a [keyword:Human Shield].
Fight: KO one of your Heroes.

cards.name: Animatronic Killer Clowns
abilities: By End of Turn: Recruit two Heroes.
Or Suffer: This Trap enters the city as a 3[icon:attack] “Animatronic Killer Clown“ [icon:7] Villain that captures a [keyword:Human Shield].

cards.name: Guillotine Rollercoaster
abilities: By End of Turn: Have at least four different costs of Heroes in the HQ.
Or Suffer: After you draw your new hand at the end of this turn, each palyer reveals their hand and discards each card with the same cost as the cards in the HQ.

cards.name: Miss Locke
abilities: Ambush: Miss Locke captures 2 [keyword:Human Shields]. Then reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a [rule:Trap] or Master Strike, play it.

cards.name: Monstrous Pinball Machine
abilities: By End of Turn: Pay any amount of [icon:recruit]. Then you must reveal the top card of the Hero Deck. If you paid enough, recruit that Hero and put this Trap in your Victory Pile.
Or Suffer: KO that Hero. Play two extra cards from the Villain Deck next turn.

cards.name: Sulfuric Acid Water Slide
abilities: Ambush: Play another card from the Villain Deck.
By End of Turn: Have no Villains in the Sewers.
Or Suffer: Each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Betrayal of the Shadow
abilities: By End of Turn: You may pay 6[icon:recruit].
Or Suffer: Each player reveals their hand. Then, each player chooses a Shadow-X card from their hand or discard pile to enter the city as a Villain.

cards.name: Dark Angel
abilities: Fight: Gain this as a Hero.
[keyword:X-Gene] [hc:instinct]: The next Hero you recruit from the HQ has [keyword:Soaring Flight].

cards.name: Dark Beast
abilities: Fight: Gain this as a Hero.
[keyword:X-Gene] [hc:tech]: You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.

cards.name: Dark Cyclops
abilities: Ambush: Each player reveals a [hc:ranged] Hero or discards a card.
Fight: Gain this as a Hero.
[keyword:X-Gene] [hc:ranged]: Return a [hc:ranged] Hero from your discard pile to your hand.

cards.name: Dark Iceman
abilities: Fight: Gain this as a Hero.

cards.name: Dark Marvel Girl
abilities: Ambush: Dark Marvel Girl [keyword:Dominates] each [team:x-men] Hero that costs 4 or less from the HQ.
Fight: Gain this as a Hero.
[keyword:X-Gene] [hc:covert]: Rescue a Bystander.

cards.name: Blackthorn
abilities: Fight: If you fought Blackthorn in the Sewers or Streets, each other player gains a Wound.
Escape: Each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Gladiator
abilities: Ambush: Each player discards an [team:x-men] Hero or gains a Wound.
Escape: Same effect.

cards.name: Oracle
abilities: Ambush: Each player discards the top four cards of their deck and chooses one of those cards that costs 1 to 4. Oracle [keyword:Dominates] those Heroes.

cards.name: Shi'ar Trial by Combat
abilities: Ambush: If the Bridge is empty, reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Villain, put it on the Bridge.
By End of Turn: Have no Villains on the Bridge.
Or Suffer: After you draw a new hand at end of turn, each player KOs a non-grey Hero from their discard pile.

cards.name: Smasher
abilities: Ambush: Each player reveals a [hc:strength] Hero or discards a card.
Fight: KO a card from your discard pile.

cards.name: Lady Deathstrike
abilities: Fight: KO one of your Heroes.
Escape: Each player reveals an [hc:instinct] Hero or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Lady Mastermind
abilities: Ambush: This Villain ascends to become a [rule:new Mastermind]. She gains the ability “Master Strike: Each player simultaneously reveals a non-grey Hero.“ Lady Mastermind [keyword:Dominates] the revealed Hero with the lowest cost (and tied for lowest).

cards.name: Resurrect Madelyne Pryor
abilities: By End of Turn: You may pay 3[icon:recruit]. If you do, shuffle this Trap back into the Villain Deck, then play a card from the Villain Deck.
Or Suffer: This Trap becomes a Scheme Twist that takes effect immediately.

cards.name: Selene
abilities: Ambush: Selene [keyword:Dominates] all of the 0-cost Heroes from the KO pile.
Fight: KO all the Heroes Dominated by Selene.
Escape: Put one Hero Dominated by Selene into each player's discard pile.

cards.name: Typhoid Mary
abilities: Ambush: Each player reveals their hand and chooses a 3-cost Hero from it. Typhoid Mary [keyword:Dominates] those Heroes.

henchmen.name: Brood, The
abilities: This Villain gets +1[icon:attack] for each Bystander in the KO pile.
Fight: KO one of your Heroes. Then KO a Bystander from the Bystander Stack.

henchmen.name: Hellfire Cult
abilities: Fight: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs 0, KO it. Otherwise, you get +1[icon:recruit].

henchmen.name: Sapien League
abilities: Fight: KO one of your Heroes. Then, reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Henchman Villain, play it.

henchmen.name: Shi'ar Death Commandos
abilities: Ambush: This Villain captures a [keyword:Human Shield].
Fight: KO one of your Heroes.

henchmen.name: Shi'ar Patrol Craft
abilities: Fight: The next Hero you recruit this turn has [keyword:Soaring Flight].
Setup: 8 Twists. Add 10 Brood as extra Henchmen. No Bystanders in Villain Deck.

Special Rules: Cards are played from the Villain Deck face-down. You may spend 1[icon:attack] to “scan“ a face-down card in the city, turning it face-up and doing any Ambush effect, Twist, [rule:Trap], or Master Strike. If a face-down card would escape, scan it, and then it escapes if it's a Villain.
Twist: The player on your right gains this Twist as a “Brood Infection.“ When drawn, they KO it and gain 2 Wounds.
Evil Wins: When 3 Villains per player have escaped.
Setup: 11 Twists. 30 Wounds.
Twist: Put this Twist into your discard pile as an “Angry Mob.“
Special Rules: At the start of your turn, for each Angry Mob in your hand, the player on your right gains a Wound and gains that Angry Mob.
Evil Wins: When the Wound Stack or Villain Deck runs out.
Setup: 10 Twists. Include Hellfire Club as one of the Villain Groups. Add 14 Jean Grey Hero cards to the Villain Deck.
Special Rules: Jean Grey cards in the Villain Deck are Villains with attack equal to their cost, “Ambush: Play another Villain card“ and “Fight: Gain this as a Hero.“
Twist: Shuffle all Jean Grey cards from the KO pile and from all players' hands and discard piles into the Villain Deck.
Evil Wins: When 5 Jean Grey cards have escaped.
Setup: 6 Twists.
Twist 1-5: Play a random Horror.
Twist 6: Evil wins!
Setup: 9 Twists. Include 10 Sentinels as extra Henchmen (or substitute another Henchman group).
Twist: Stack this Twist next to the Scheme as a “Sentinel Upgrade.“ Shuffle all Sentinels from players' Victory Piles into the Villain Deck. Play another card from the Villain Deck.
Special Rules: All Sentinels get +1[icon:attack] for each Sentinel Upgrade next to the Scheme.
Evil Wins: When 3 Sentinels have Escaped.
Setup: 5 Twists.
Twist: Destroy the city space closest to the Mastermind. Any Villain There escapes. Put this Twist there.
Evil Wins: When the city is destroyed.
Setup: 11 Twists. 6 Wounds per player in Wound Stack.
Twist: Stack this Twist next to the Scheme as a “Deathtrap.“ This turn, you may pay 1[icon:attack] for each Deathtrap stacked there. If you don't, each player gains a Wound.
Evil Wins: When the Wound Stack or Villain Deck runs out.
Setup: 8 Twists.

Twist: [rule:Trap! By End of Turn]: You may pay 2[icon:recruit]. If you do, shuffle this Twist back into the Villain Deck, then play a card from the Villain Deck. Or Suffer: Stack this Twist next to the scheme as an “Airborne Neurotoxin.“
Evil Wins: When there are 5 Airborne Neurotoxins.
When you rescue this Bystander, gain it as a Hero.
